nasb.text: and three-tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering, for each bull; and two-tenths of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering, for the one ram;

esv.text: also three tenths of an ephah of fine flour for a grain offering, mixed with oil, for each bull, and two tenths of fine flour for a grain offering, mixed with oil, for the one ram;

cnv.text: 為每頭公牛，要獻三公斤細麵，用油調和作素祭；為每隻公綿羊，要獻兩公斤細麵，用油調和作素祭；

ccb.text: 同时要献上调了油的细面粉作素祭，每头公牛需献三公斤素祭，每只公绵羊需献两公斤素祭，
